name: Day 2: Hypno-Con
description:
Day 2: Hypno-Con

The Hypno-Con is a wonderful hypnosis focused convention with everything you can think of, lots of fun and many activities for both the hypnotized folks and the hypnotizers, come in! And see the wonders this convention can bring you!

Were so back! This is a bot I really wanted to make the concept a good while back and only got to do it now, still, hope y'all enjoy it!
